title: Remove Nth Node From End of List
description: Given the head of a linked list, remove the n th node from the end of the list and return its head.   Example 1: Input: head = [1,2,3,4,5], n = 2 Output: [1,2,3,5] Example 2: Input: head = [1], n = 1 Output: [] Example 3: Input: head = [1,2], n = 1 Output: [1]   Constraints: The number of nodes in the list is sz . 1 <= sz <= 30 0 <= Node.val <= 100 1 <= n <= sz   Follow up: Could you do this in one pass?
hints: Maintain two pointers and update one with a delay of n steps.
